title: Rei Plushie Pet
description: Adds a Rei Plushie you can feed, pet and heal yourself with
body:
Basically adds the Rei Plushie to your game

The mod will change without the description changing, but most features will remain similar

Adds the Rei Plushie and Chocolate Milk

- You gain her on spawn
- You can craft one with 1 totem of undying and 8 light blue wools
- You need to feed her and pet her
    Feeding her with chocolate milk feeds it more
    You can craft this chocolate milk with a milk bucket, cocoa beans and sugar
- If she dies, you'll recieve 2 hearts of damage and its gone
- Heals depending of her hunger and friendliness

Controls:
- Right click - Pet
- Right click with food offhand - Feed
- Shift + Right click - Opens the stats
- R - Heal

Some items textures are basically from Roblox

The plushie 3d model is temporary until my friend makes a model
here is the resource pack its from, if its creator askes me to remove it, I will:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/rei-plush-totem-by-mrdrthor-1-13-1-19-x/
